'''Jaysa Namoor''' was a media critic and the [[President/Legends|president]] of the [[Core World Critics Association]] in<ref name="Hnn" /> [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="22 BBY">The [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:14 corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> She was known for heavily criticizing summer [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilms]].<ref name="Hnn" />

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|life/13321_1.html|Holo Critics Preemptively Bemoan Summer Season}} {{1st}}
